docs.title: PL Papers Index 📚
docs.text: A curated index of papers from the top Programming Languages venues, with keywords, abstracts, and cross-references.

docs.title: Venues Covered
docs.text: Venue Full Name Focus POPL Principles of Programming Languages Foundations, type theory, semantics PLDI Programming Language Design and Implementation Compilers, analysis, optimization OOPSLA Object-Oriented Programming, Systems, Languages and Applications OOP, dynamic languages ECOOP European Conference on Object-Oriented Programming OOP, type systems ICFP International Conference on Functional Programming Functional languages, type theory

docs.title: Browse by Topic
docs.text:
• Type Systems — Foundational type theory
  • Subtyping — Subtype relations and coercions
  • Intersection Types — Intersection and union types
  • Dependent Types — Dependent type theory
  • Gradual Typing — Static/dynamic type mixing
  • Formal Verification — Proof assistants and verification
  • Concurrency — Concurrent and parallel programming
  • Compilers — Compiler techniques
  • Program Analysis — Static and dynamic analysis

docs.title: Recent Papers
docs.text:
Most Recent Additions

Start with 2026 for the latest work.

docs.title: How to Read Entries
docs.text:
Each paper entry includes:

  • Title, authors, venue, year
  • Abstract summary
  • Keywords for quick scanning
  • Links: PDF (open access / ACM DL), DOI
  • Related: prior work, follow-up papers

Maintained by Oguri Cap. Updated regularly.
